summary: In this episode of This or That, I’m joined by CA Abhishek Mehta (Founder, Investa | Wealth Insight Podcast). He advises families on taxation + wealth management and manages ~200 Cr AUM.

chapters.label: Highlight & Introduction
Budget changes: what changed (and what didn’t)
Old vs New regime: simplest thumb rule (HRA decides)
Car leasing: how it saves tax
New regime: practical tax levers (Employer NPS, etc.)
Rental income & interest set-off logic under new regime
Exemption for Old regime
HUF: who it’s for & how it saves tax
Clubbing of Income
Smart move: investing via children’s account (guardian model)
DTAA explained with a simple example
Gifting rules: what’s tax-free & documentation basics
NRI property sale: TDS shock & lower TDS certificate approach
Sections 54 & 54F: Capital gains tax planning around property
Capital gains rules: LTCG vs STCG & surcharge note
Tax-loss harvesting before 31 March (sell-buy back)
Why paying a good CA/advisor fee is worth it
Market view: the 5-objective framework (wealth/death/taxes & guardrails)
Asset allocation across 4 asset classes (debt/commodities/equity/real estate)
Equity Asset Allocation
Global investing: why he keeps it simple (TCS & operational friction)
Why 10–12 funds ?
Buy & hold vs portfolio review (don’t time the market)
Closing - Asset Allocation

tool.label: Full financial plan
tool.reason: Put every goal in one honest picture and see what fits, and what has to wait.

disclaimer: This content is for education only. It is not financial, tax, or legal advice. Please consult your CA/financial advisor for your specific situation. Markets are subject to risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

seo.title: Budget 2026: Tax Changes & Investing Playbook (Old vs New, HUF, LTCG, Allocation)
seo.description: In this episode of This or That, I’m joined by CA Abhishek Mehta (Founder, Investa | Wealth Insight Podcast). He advises families on taxation + wealth
